metadata.description: Give Claude eyes and ears for online content. /consume studies YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, Reddit, and LinkedIn on demand — transcript first, frames only when needed.

plugins.name: consume
plugins.description: Consume and study any content the user links — YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, Reddit, LinkedIn. Fetches transcript/caption/text on demand and only the specific frames or images it needs. Transcription via Groq/OpenAI/local, all with timestamps.
